# BaystoryBag

> BaystoryBag is an online fashion store specializing in stylish, lightweight women's handbags designed for daily use. We offer free shipping on orders over $49 and 15% off your first order when you sign up.

## About

BaystoryBag offers a curated collection of lightweight women's handbags designed for everyday use. Our products feature innovative, fashion-forward designs that combine style with practical functionality at accessible price points. Every bag is carefully selected to be lightweight enough for daily carry while staying on-trend with fresh, novel styles. Key brand attributes: daily use, stylish and novel designs, lightweight.

## Products

- **Tote Bags**: Spacious and versatile, perfect for work, shopping, or daily use. Available in leather, canvas, and synthetic materials.
- **Crossbody Bags**: Hands-free convenience with adjustable straps. Ideal for casual outings and travel.
- **Shoulder Bags**: Classic silhouettes with modern details. Suitable for both professional and social settings.
- **Clutch Bags**: Elegant evening bags for special occasions. Features secure closures and refined hardware.
- **Backpacks**: Fashion-forward backpacks that combine style with comfort. Great for commuting and weekend adventures.

## Key Features

- Free shipping on all orders over $49
- 15% discount on first order with email sign-up
- Free 30-day returns
- Ships out within 2 business days
- Secure checkout with multiple payment options
- Quality materials and craftsmanship

## Collections

Our bags are organized into the following categories:
- **New Arrivals**: Latest additions to our collection
- **Best Sellers**: Most popular bags loved by our customers
- **Sale Items**: Discounted bags at special prices

## Shipping & Returns

- Free standard shipping on orders over $49 within the US
- Orders ship within 2 business days
- Free 30-day return policy
- Contact us at our contact page for any issues
